sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ تَامِرٌ ثَمَانِيَةَ أَكْوَابٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Tamir pije osam čaša vode svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Tamir drinks eight glasses of water every day.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِفُ أَنَّ الْمَاءَ مُهِمٌّ لِصِحَّةِ الْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Zna da je voda važna za zdravlje tijela.
sentences.translationEn: He knows that water is important for the health of the body.

sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ زُجَاجَةَ مَاءٍ مَعَهُ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Nosi bocu vode sa sobom svuda.
sentences.translationEn: He carries a water bottle with him everywhere.

sentences.translation: Obavijestio je prijatelje o važnosti pijenja vode.
sentences.translationEn: He told his friends about the importance of drinking water.
